---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: coder-knock
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Problem this Feature Solves

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature solves. For example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution (Optional)

If you have ideas about how to implement this, please describe it.

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
